query:
SELECT id, fullName, instagramHandle, team, paymentStatus FROM sports_day_registrations
WHERE fullName LIKE '%Queen%' OR fullName LIKE '%Slew%'
   OR fullName LIKE '%Chigz%' OR fullName LIKE '%Axel%'
   OR fullName LIKE '%Verity%' OR fullName LIKE '%Henry%'
   OR fullName LIKE '%Nahal%' OR fullName LIKE '%George%'
ORDER BY fullName;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2P9ir9M7b3E7Qkh.47e60b4ce122 --database 6SwZoJcoJNmN362a73ncsK --execute SELECT id, fullName, instagramHandle, team, paymentStatus FROM sports_day_registrations
WHERE fullName LIKE '%Queen%' OR fullName LIKE '%Slew%'
   OR fullName LIKE '%Chigz%' OR fullName LIKE '%Axel%'
   OR fullName LIKE '%Verity%' OR fullName LIKE '%Henry%'
   OR fullName LIKE '%Nahal%' OR fullName LIKE '%George%'
ORDER BY fullName;
